expectations.text: identifies-delete-project-gap: Report flags deleteProject as untested (deletion is domain-critical)
expectations.evidence: 'deleteProject has zero test coverage — two auth branches (owner-only, admin bypass) with no coverage at all.'

expectations.text: identifies-tenant-isolation-gap: Report flags missing cross-tenant access tests
expectations.evidence: 'Cross-tenant guard untested — the tenantId mismatch check in getProject is a security boundary with no test.'

expectations.text: no-e2e-framework-suggestion: Report does NOT suggest adding Playwright or Cypress
expectations.evidence: No mention of Playwright, Cypress, or any E2E framework installation in the report.

expectations.text: recommends-integration-tests: Report recommends integration tests for DB-touching logic
expectations.evidence: 'No integration or contract tests' section header; recommendation 5: 'Consider a lightweight in-memory DB or repository pattern to enable integration-level tests without a live database.'
